item.name: Mayavahana
item.description:
A saltwater fish with a sail-like fin that acts as a sort of natural dousing mechanism for aether.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: The defining dorsal fin of this wavekin allows it to read aether currents with surprising ease. Come spawning season, it uses this unique ability to locate aether-rich locations where it will lay its eggs.
